home.heroTitle: Furniture as enduring as the rooms it inhabits.
home.heroSubtitle: Heirloom-grade pieces, hand-finished by master artisans, designed to outlive trend cycles.
home.featuredSubtitle: A curated selection from the current season.
home.philosophyTitle: Slow design. Honest materials. A single signature on every piece.
home.philosophyBody: Each item is built to order in our atelier from kiln-dried European oak, full-grain leather, and solid brass. Nothing leaves our workshop until it would feel at home a hundred years from now.
home.ctaBody: Custom dimensions, bespoke finishes, considered conversations. Tell us what you have in mind.

products.title: The Collection
products.subtitle: Built to order. Delivered to last.

about.title: The Atelier
about.lead: A small workshop, a long memory.
about.bodyOne: Maison Lumière was founded in 2018 by a third-generation cabinetmaker who believed that good furniture should be made the way it was a century ago — slowly, by hand, by people who sign their work.
about.bodyTwo: Our pieces are built to order in a converted barn outside the city, by a team of seven artisans who have collectively spent over a hundred and twenty years at the bench. We work with kiln-dried European oak, vegetable-tanned leather, and brass cast within fifty kilometres of the workshop.
about.bodyThree: Every piece carries a small signature on its underside. If, in fifty years, a joint loosens or a finish ages — bring it back. We will restore it.
